title: Exploitation & Vulnerability Assessment
overview: Module 4 is where you go on offense. You'll learn how vulnerabilities are discovered and exploited, practice controlled attacks in a safe lab environment, and then conduct a structured penetration test for a manufacturing client.

weeks_breakdown.labDesc: Nessus/OpenVAS fundamentals. CVE scoring, CVSS, vulnerability prioritization.
Metasploit basics. Controlled exploitation in isolated lab environment.
Client engagement. Scoped pen test + executive findings report.

clientContext.label: Client Context: Alamo Industries
clientContext.body: Rodrigo Vega (VP Operations) is preparing for a mandatory industrial compliance audit. The OT/IT boundary on the manufacturing floor is poorly segmented. David Kim needs a vulnerability assessment before the auditors arrive.

footer: Start with Lab 4.1 in the Assignments section.

notice.label: ⚠️ Offensive Techniques Module:
notice.body: These skills are for authorized security assessments only. Never use password cracking tools without explicit written permission. Everything here is on NEXUS-authorized client systems.
